reviews.review_description: The game have been in development for a while. And I'm excited that I'd try it out. I know the owner and everything so they are good people to play with right when the game came out. So I'm glad to try it out. And I wish y'all could try it out too. But sadly warning, I know, it's like one glitch, but I just nestled the map right when I died like a baby where I was running😅 what in my own words would give it 5 stars, but this time I keep eating it honest.

developer_response.body:
Appreciate the support fr 🙏
Glad you enjoyed the game and gave it a shot. And yeah, thanks for pointing out that glitch—we’ll look into it and get it fixed soon. More updates coming 👍

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best games I’ve seen they have a horror mode and good working mechanics and good graphics you should install this right away!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much 🙌
Really glad you’re enjoying the mechanics and horror mode—that’s exactly what we’ve been focusing on. More improvements and updates coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
This game is peak and bacon lighting hehehe✌️🥹
But it’s a very good game with horror and player model.
Very creative too

developer_response.body:
Appreciate it a lot 🙏 glad you’re enjoying it!!
The horror vibe + player model is something we’ve been putting a ton of work into, so it means a lot hearing that. More updates coming soon 👀

reviews.review_description: This is a really fun horror game they have fun events so i really recommend checking out this game 👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, really appreciate it 🙌

Glad you’re enjoying the game and the events! We just released the new Pool Rooms update, and we’ve got more stuff coming soon.

reviews.review_description: When i joined i i played and it was really fun.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for playing! Glad you enjoyed it 🙌

We just released the new Pool Rooms update, so there’s more to explore now. More updates coming soon!

reviews.review_description: Spooky well made game PLAY NOW

developer_response.body:
Appreciate it 🙏
Glad you’re enjoying the spooky vibe and visuals—that means a lot. We’re working on even more updates soon, so stay tuned 👀
